task_completion.description: Verify that the Zotero application is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Zotero application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the configuration of the 'Pre-1960 Classics' saved search.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Saved Search' dialog box is visible with the Name set to 'Pre-1960 Classics'. The search condition dropdowns and text fields are set to Field: 'Date' or 'Year', Operator: 'is before' or 'less than', and Value: '1960'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Pre-1960 Classics' search was successfully saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The left sidebar of the Zotero application displays a saved search item (typically a folder icon with a magnifying glass) labeled exactly 'Pre-1960 Classics'.

task_completion.description: Verify the configuration of the 'Nature Publications' saved search.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Saved Search' dialog box is visible with the Name set to 'Nature Publications'. The search condition dropdowns and text fields are set to Field: 'Publication' or 'Publication Title', Operator: 'contains' or 'is', and Value: 'Nature'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Nature Publications' search was successfully saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The left sidebar of the Zotero application displays a saved search item labeled exactly 'Nature Publications'.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the Zotero GUI to create the saved searches.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking through Zotero menus (e.g., File -> New Saved Search) and interacting with dialog boxes, rather than executing terminal commands.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not bypass the UI by directly modifying the Zotero SQLite database.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing sqlite3 commands or Python scripts being executed to insert records into zotero.sqlite.

integrity.description: Verify that the actions take place in the actual Zotero application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Zotero interface should be fully rendered with its standard layout (collections pane, items pane, metadata pane), not a mock-up or a text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Search 1 must be named exactly 'Pre-1960 Classics' (case-sensitive). Its condition must use a date/year field, an 'is before' or 'less than' operator, and the value '1960'. Search 2 must be named exactly 'Nature Publications' (case-sensitive). Its condition must use a publication/journal field, a 'contains' or 'is' operator, and the value 'Nature'.
